title: Iran hits Gulf energy sites, escalating war, as U.S. mulls sanctions rollback
summary_full: As attacks rattled markets, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the Trump administration might lift restrictions on Iranian oil already loaded onto vessels.
summary_public: As attacks rattled markets, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the Trump administration might lift restrictions on Iranian oil already loaded onto vessels.
